let AgenticMenuContribution = class AgenticMenuContribution {
    registerMenus(menus) {

        menus.registerSubmenu(AgenticMenus.AGENTIC_EXPERIMENTS, 'Experiments');

            commandId: agentic_commands_1.AgenticCommands.CREATE_SESSION.id,
